current_run.problem_name: Hidden Majority of Pairwise Cyclic Products
current_run.description: Given an N-bit secret integer `s`, the oracle computes f(x) = ( (x_0 * x_1 + x_1 * x_2 + ... + x_{N-2} * x_{N-1} + x_{N-1} * x_0) mod 2 ) XOR ( (s_0 * s_1 + s_1 * s_2 + ... + s_{N-2} * s_{N-1} + s_{N-1} * s_0) mod 2 ). The goal is to find the secret `s`.
